mapper.insert: insert into module_outbox_events() values(#{event.outboxId},#{event.eventId},#{event.eventType},#{event.aggregateType},#{event.aggregateId},coalesce(cast(#{event.payloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb),#{event.status},#{event.attemptCount},#{event.nextAttemptAt},#{event.lastError},#{event.claimedBy},#{event.claimUntil},#{event.createdAt},#{event.publishedAt},#{event.updatedAt}) on conflict(event_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update module_outbox_events set status='PUBLISHED',published_at=#{publishedAt},updated_at=#{publishedAt},last_error=null,next_attempt_at=null,claimed_by=null,claim_until=null where outbox_id=#{outboxId} and status='DISPATCHING' and claimed_by=#{workerId} and claim_until=#{claimUntil}

update module_outbox_events set status='RETRY_WAITING',attempt_count=#{attemptCount},next_attempt_at=#{nextAttemptAt},last_error=#{error},claimed_by=null,claim_until=null,updated_at=#{updatedAt} where outbox_id=#{outboxId} and status='DISPATCHING' and claimed_by=#{workerId} and claim_until=#{claimUntil}

update module_outbox_events set status='DEAD_LETTER',attempt_count=#{attemptCount},last_error=#{error},next_attempt_at=null,claimed_by=null,claim_until=null,updated_at=#{updatedAt} where outbox_id=#{outboxId} and status='DISPATCHING' and claimed_by=#{workerId} and claim_until=#{claimUntil}
mapper.select: select from module_outbox_events order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
